rangedWeapons.name: Syntaxik Charger
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Sonic Devastation

abilities.name: Electro-shock
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding Monsters and Vehicles) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the end of your opponent’s next turn, that enemy unit is shocked. While a unit is shocked, subtract 2" from its Move characteristic and subtract 2 from Advance and Charge rolls made for it.

rangedWeapons.name: Syntaxik Charger
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Sonic Devastation

abilities.name: Electro-Infusion
abilities.desc: While a Character model is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Elevated Strider
abilities.desc: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back or Advanced, and you can re-roll Desperate Escape tests taken for models in this unit.

abilities.name: Broad Spectrum Data-tether
abilities.desc: Each time you select this unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Sonic Devastation

abilities.name: Robotic Bodyguard
abilities.desc: While a Cybernetica Datasmith model is leading this unit, that model has the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abilities.name: Repulsor Grid
abilities.desc: Each time a ranged attack is allocated to a Kastelan Robot model in this unit, on an unmodified saving throw of 6, the attacking unit suffers 1 mortal wound after it has finished making its attacks.

rangedWeapons.name: Syntaxik Charger
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Sonic Devastation

abilities.name: Breaching Command
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1. While this unit is within 6” of one or more friendly Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline units, you can re-roll the Hit  roll instead.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 6+ invulnerable save.

rangedWeapons.name: Syntaxik Charger
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Sonic Devastation

abilities.name: Sentinel Directive
abilities.desc: Each time you target this unit with the Fire Overwatch Stratagem, hits are scored on unmodified Hit rolls of 5+ when resolving that Stratagem.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 6+ invulnerable save.

rangedWeapons.name: Syntaxik Charger
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Sonic Devastation

abilities.name: Ride the Thermals
abilities.desc:
In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can do one of the following: 
■ Make a Normal move of up to 6".
■ Make a Normal move of up to 12", provided every model in this unit ends that move wholly within 6" of one or more friendly Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline units.

In either case, if it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge.�

rangedWeapons.name: Syntaxik Charger
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Sonic Devastation

abilities.name: Searing Conflagaration
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack with a phosphor torch that targets an enemy unit within range of an objective marker, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. If this unit is also within 6" of one or more friendly Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline units, each time such an attack targets such a unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

rangedWeapons.name: Syntaxik Charger
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Sonic Devastation

abilities.name: Tactica Obliqua
abilities.desc:
Once per turn, when an enemy unit ends a Normal, Advance or Fall Back move within 9" of this unit, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can do one of the following:
■ Make a Normal move of up to D6".
■ Make a Normal move of up to 6", provided every model in this unit ends that move wholly within 6" of one or more friendly Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline units.

abilities.name: Enhanced data-tether
abilities.desc: Each time you select the bearer’s unit as the target of a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

rangedWeapons.name: Syntaxik Charger
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Sonic Devastation

abilities.name: Line-breakers
abilities.desc: Each time this unit ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of it and roll one D6 for each model in this unit that is within Engagement Range of that enemy unit, adding 2 to the result if this unit started its Charge move within 6" of one or more friendly Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline units. For each 4+, that enemy unit suffers 1 mortal wound.

rangedWeapons.name: Syntaxik Charger
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Sonic Devastation

abilities.name: Neurostatic Interference (Aura)
abilities.desc: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this unit, each time a Battle-shock or Leadership test is taken for that unit, subtract 1 from that test. While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline units, subtract 2 from that test instead.

rangedWeapons.name: Syntaxik Charger
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Sonic Devastation

abilities.name: Optimised Gait
abilities.desc: Add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit. While this unit is within 6" of one or more friendly Adeptus Mechanicus Battleline units, add 2 to Advance and Charge rolls made for this unit instead.

rangedWeapons.name: Syntaxik Charger
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 2+, Devastating Wounds, One Shot, Sonic Devastation

abilities.name: Objective Scouted
abilities.desc: At the end of your Command phase, if this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, that objective marker remains under your control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn.

abilities.desc: This model cannot be your WARLORD.

abilities.name: Achillan Eye
abilities.desc: Each time this model makes an attack with a radium jezzail that targets an Infantry unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll. Each time this model makes an attack with a Skatros transuranic arquebus that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Mindlock
abilities.desc: While a TECH-PRIEST model is leading this unit, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of ranged and melee weapons equipped by SERVITOR models in this unit by 1.

abilities.name: Servitor Retinue
abilities.desc: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a TECH-PRIEST ENGINSEER model (a unit cannot have more than one SERVITORS unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

abilities.name: Network Override
abilities.desc:
While this unit contains one or more ^^**Tech-Priest^^** models, this unit is: 
- Eligible to perform an Action in a turn in which it Advanced. 
- Eligible to shoot in a turn in which it started an Action.

abilities.name: Invulnerable Save
abilities.desc: Models in this unit have a 6+ invulnerable save.

abilities.name: Attached Unit
abilities.desc: If a ^^**Character^^** unit from your army with the Leader ability can be attached to a ^^**Kataphron Breachers^^** unit, it can be attached to this unit instead.
